title: Colysis christovalensis
taxonomy: Colysis christovalensis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Colysis christovalensis is native to the Philippines. It is classified as a vascular plant and a member of the division Pteridophyta. Colysis christovalensis belongs to the genus Colysis, which consists of about 30 species of ferns. Colysis christovalensis is often found in tropical and subtropical regions.
uses: Colysis christovalensis is known to have been used traditionally for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
